V0200A10A_ACTVTY_CTR_CD V0200A10A Activity Care Area Trigger Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the Activity CA was triggered. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
583 V0200A10B_ACTVTY_CPL_CD V0200A10B_ACTVTY_CPL_CD V0200A10B Activity Addressed in Care Plan Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the Activity care area was addressed in the care plan. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
584
